generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just read about how the new domestic security measures have already stopped three potential attacks this year alone. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when you look at the facts, it's clear these powers are necessary. We can't afford to be naive about security. The complexity of modern threats means we need tools that let our agencies act decisively. Yes, there are trade-offs, but in an uncertain world, isn't it better to have the capability and not need it than the other way around? #NationalSecurityMatters #BalancingRightsAndSafety
